'''lahojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanol|cyanol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanol|cyanol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lahojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhejeth|læhejeth]] || [[word:læhejej|læhejej]] || [[word:læhejesh|læhejesh]] || [[word:læheje|læheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahohojoth|lahohojoth]] || [[word:lahohojoj|lahohojoj]] || [[word:lahohojosh|lahohojosh]] || [[word:lahohojo|lahohojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahojoth|lahojoth]] || [[word:lahojoj|lahojoj]] || [[word:lahojosh|lahojosh]] || [[word:lahojo|lahojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahofjofth|lahofjofth]] || [[word:lahofjofj|lahofjofj]] || [[word:lahofjofsh|lahofjofsh]] || [[word:lahofjof|lahofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahojotho|lahojotho]] || [[word:lahojojo|lahojojo]] || [[word:lahojosho|lahojosho]] || [[word:lahojoko|lahojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahojoth|lahojoth]] || [[word:lahojoj|lahojoj]] || [[word:lahojosh|lahojosh]] || [[word:lahojo|lahojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahojothol|lahojothol]] || [[word:lahojojol|lahojojol]] || [[word:lahojoshol|lahojoshol]] || [[word:lahojokol|lahojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahojoothotho|lahojoothotho]] || [[word:lahojoojojo|lahojoojojo]] || [[word:lahojooshosho|lahojooshosho]] || [[word:lahojooko|lahojooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahojothon|lahojothon]] || [[word:lahojojon|lahojojon]] || [[word:lahojoshon|lahojoshon]] || [[word:lahojokon|lahojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahojothooro|lahojothooro]] || [[word:lahojojooro|lahojojooro]] || [[word:lahojoshooro|lahojoshooro]] || [[word:lahojokooro|lahojokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
